H3_wave_planner_accuracy.prediction: wave planner accuracy >70% at frontier level
H3_wave_planner_accuracy.result: COMMIT guarantee correctly dispatched social-media (F-SOC4 → DOMEX-SOC-S396 MERGED)
H3_wave_planner_accuracy.verdict: CONFIRMED with caveat: multi-frontier parsing bug found

bug_found.root_cause: re.search(r'frontier=(F-[A-Z0-9]+)') captured only first frontier ID from comma/slash-separated multi-frontier lanes. Character class also omitted '-' (dash), causing silent match failures.

impact.example_misclassification: F-SOC4 showed as 2-wave COMMIT (unresolved) — was actually 5-wave RESOLVED

bug_found.fix_applied: re.findall(r'F-[A-Z0-9]+', frontier_str) with broadened capture r'frontier=(F-[A-Z0-9,/\s-]+?)(?:;|$)'
